description: Please don't call me beginner 'cause this problem is actually alike the game Black: My Knowing Woman vs White: Her Daughter. She made me check out the saved game through her smart phone. I don't remember the position but she doesn't know how to start a game, her first Black's move is correct-remembering in my brain, also her stones are all dead as the fake eyes. The unfortunately things are actually beginner's playing. Please think about me who won some people and AI. Why do some people call me beginner ? Any evidence ?
